Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

CM 12, 08 [Gift of house in Market City Gate district and one female slave][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

md60-DUMU-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši ARAD E₂.GAL ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ E₂-su

o 22

ep₂-šu₂ ina KIti₃ KA₂.GAL GANBA ša₂ qe₂-reb UNUGki US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅SI.SA₂

o 33

GU₂ ID₂-dINANA US₂ KIu₂ tu₁₅U₁₈.LU DA ki-šub-ba-a ša₂ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mARAD-dMAŠ se-pi-ri NIG₂.GA d<60>

o 44

SAG.KI AN.TA tu₁₅MAR.TU DA SILA mu-rad ID₂-dINANA SAG.KI KI.TA

o 55

tu₁₅KUR.RA DA ki-šub-ba-a ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ u DA ki-šub-ba-a ša₂ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MU

o 66

DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mE₂.KUR-za-kir ŠU.NIGIN US₂-MEŠ u SAG.KI-MEŠ mi-šiḫ-tu₄

o 77

E₂ MU-MEŠ E₂ MU-MEŠ i-ṣi u ma-a-du ma-la ba-šu-u₂ gab-bi u fri-ḫat-dGAŠAN-EDIN

o 88

GEME₂ ša₂ ŠU-MIN 15-šu₂ la šaṭ-rat DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ msu-mut-tu₄-d60 a-na ri-mu₁₂-u₂-tu₂ a-na

o 99

mri-ḫat-d60 u mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 lu₂ARAD E₂.GAL

o 1010

a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ it-ta-din ku-um ri-mu₁₂-u₂-tu₂ ša₂ E₂ u fri-ḫat-dGAŠAN-EDIN

o 1111

GEME₂ MU-MEŠ 5/6 MA.NA KU₃.BABBAR is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su bab-ba-nu-u₂-tu₂

o 1212

ina ŠU-MIN mri-ḫat-d60 u mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mla-ba-ši md60-DUMU-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mNU-TEŠ₂

o 1313

lu₂ARAD E₂.GAL qu-bu-lu ul i-šal-aṭ!(AM-)ma md60-DUMU-MUnu a-ga-a E₂ MU-MEŠ

o 1414

u fri-ḫat-dGAŠAN-EDIN GEME₂ MU-MEŠ a-na KU₃.BABBAR a-na ri-ʾi-u₂-tu₂ a-na nu-dun-nu-u₂

o 1515

a-na e-peš ṣu-bu-u₂-tu₂ a-na mim-ma gab-bi u ma-am ša₂-nam-ma gab-bi

o 1616

e-lat a-na mri-ḫat-d60 u mni-din-tu₄-d60 ŠEŠ-šu₂ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mla-ba-ši ARAD E₂.GAL

o 1717

ul i-din ul i-nam-din ki-i i-din ki-i it-tan-nu ul u₂-šu-zu

o 1818

u₃ u₂-mar-qu md60-DUMU-MUnu a-ga-a a-na mri-ḫat-d60 u mni-din-tu₄-d<60> ŠEŠ-šu₂

Reverse
r 1r 1

ša₂ la DI.KU₅ u la ḫar-ri 1 MA.NA KU₃.BABBAR bab-ba-nu-u₂-tu₂!(NU) i-nam-din

r 22

E₂ MU-MEŠ u fri-ḫat-dGAŠAN-EDIN GEME₂ MU-MEŠ ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 u mni-din-tu₄-d60 ŠEŠ-šu₂

r 33

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 lu₂ARAD E₂.GAL a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ šu₂-nu

(witnesses)
r 44

lu₂mu-kin₇ mdum-qi₂-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 55

md60-EN-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂ mki-din-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 66

mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdum-qi₂-d60 DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 77

mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mki-din-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 88

md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu! DUMU ša₂ msu-mut-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mkur-i1

r 99

mi-dat-d60 DUMU ša₂ mil-lut-d60 DUMU ša₂ mBAD₄-dGAŠAN A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

r 1010

mARAD-dMAŠ DUMU ša₂ md60-DUMU-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-dINANA lu₂se-pi-ri NIG₂.GA d60

r 1111

mu₂-ṣur-šu₂-d60 DUMU ša₂ mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mE₂-BABBAR-MU-DU₃

(colophon)
r 1212

md60-BAša₂-an-ni lu₂UMBISAG lu₂GALA.MAḪ d60 DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki

r 1313

itiAB U₄ 18-KAM₂ MU 124-KAM₂ man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su u mse-lu-ku DUMU-šu₂ LUGAL-MEŠ

(sealings)

Column i
(signature)
t.e. i 11

un-qa

t.e. ii 11

mina-qi₂-bit-d602

t.e. iii 11

un-qa

(impression of seal = CM 12, no. 57 = AUWE 19, 0596 )
t.e. iii 22

mla-ba-ši

Column i

b.e. i 11

un-qa

b.e. iii 22

Left
Column i
(signature)
l.e. i 11

un-qa

(impression of seal = CM 12, no. 17 = AUWE 19, 0167:D)
l.e. i 22

mu₂-ṣur-šu₂-d60

Column ii
(signature)
l.e. ii 11

un-qa

(impression of seal = CM 12, no. 80 = AUWE 19, 0916S)
l.e. ii 22

md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu

Right
(signature)
r.e. 11

un-qa md60-DUMU-MUnu

(impression of seal = CM 12, no. 03 = AUWE 19, 0026:A )
r.e. 22

lu₂na-din-na-an E₂ u fri-ḫat-dGAŠAN-EDIN MU-MEŠ

1Name certain on basis of l.e. ii orthography; following MU, signs are clearly {d}60.

2caption could be error for Dumqi-Anu; for ambiguity of assignment of seal to witness, see CM 12 p. 48 note 1

3caption could be error for Dumqi-Anu;for ambiguity of assignment of seal to witness, see CM 12 p. 48 note 1
